name: 暗影双匕（★） | 人工染色
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
